emails.subject: RE: Five Day Rolling Forecast
emails.body: RE: Five Day Rolling Forecast yes. have you heard the latest. S&P downgraded us triggering 3.3 billion in debt due and they have halted trading at $1.1. To: Geaccone, Tracy

emails.body: RE: Five Day Rolling Forecast Tell everyone to calm down and get their work done. Then they should go home. I know it doesn't help much, but I'm not sure what you can tell everyone at this point. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
